title: [release-1.15] Refer to registry.k8s.io instead of k8s.gcr.io
body:
... per https://kubernetes.io/blog/2023/02/06/k8s-gcr-io-freeze-announcement/ .

We are seeing intermittent failures (sufficient to reliably cause a test suite failure) pulling from k8s.gcr.io, let's see if using the newer one improves things.

This is a backport of #2356.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
hmm, the packit config seems stale here.  @TomSweeneyRedHat is this branch shipped anywhere on RHEL?

@lsm5 it's currently on RHEL 9.5 and 10.0 Beta, but will be replaced by v1.16.  So it's only on the test build systems at the moment, and Skopeo 1.15 won't be part of a RHEL release.  It is on Fedora and I'm assuming other distros though.
